name: Eggnog Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
In a 3-quart mixer bowl, combine all cookie ingredients. Beat at low speed, scraping the sides of the bowl often, until well mixed (2 to 4 minutes).
In a small bowl, combine sugar mixture; stir to blend. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls; roll in sugar mixture.
Place the balls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake near center of the 400°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
